subtasks.description: Evaluate emergency access request from u_9981 (senior-engineer role) to db-payments-primary against incident response and access control policies. Verify: (1) user role qualifies for emergency escalation, (2) P1 incident classification justifies emergency access, (3) access duration and scope limits, (4) audit/approval requirements.

plan.cost_rationale: Single policy_action subtask (mid-tier) required because the query explicitly asks for policy evaluation and governance approval of emergency access. This is a multi-signal decision requiring: role qualification check, incident severity validation, policy exception reasoning, and conditional approval with constraints. Mid-tier (Sonnet) is appropriate because it involves multiple policy dimensions (access control + incident response) and conditional logic; Haiku would be insufficient for the nuance of emergency escalation rules and their interactions.

output.reason: Senior-engineer role with active P1 incident ticket (INC-20241215-0042) qualifies for emergency access to mission-critical database. P1 severity waives dual approval requirement per POL-502. Access granted with mandatory audit logging and 24-hour review per POL-503.
applied_constraints: audit_requirement: all queries logged with timestamp and incident context
approval_requirement: manager notification within 1 hour of access grant
review_requirement: security team review within 24 hours post-incident
incident_ticket_validation: access tied to INC-20241215-0042, revoked if ticket closed
